debug_info.goal:
L : Logic ℕ
φ ψ χ ξ : Formula ℕ
T : LO.Propositional.FTheory L
hT : χ ➝ ξ ∉ LO.Propositional.FTheory.theory L T
inst✝ : Entailment.F L
hφψ : φ ⋎ ψ ∈ LO.Propositional.FTheory.lindenbaum.construction_omega L χ ξ T hT
hφ : φ ∉ LO.Propositional.FTheory.lindenbaum.construction_omega L χ ξ T hT
hψ : ψ ∉ LO.Propositional.FTheory.lindenbaum.construction_omega L χ ξ T hT
left✝¹ : χ ➝ φ ∉ LO.Propositional.FTheory.theory L T
Γ : Finset (Formula ℕ)
hΓ₁ : ↑Γ ⊆ LO.Propositional.FTheory.lindenbaum.construction L χ ξ T hT (encode φ)
hΓ₂ : Γ.conj ⋏ φ ➝ ξ ∈ LO.Propositional.FTheory.theory L T
left✝ : χ ➝ ψ ∉ LO.Propositional.FTheory.theory L T
Δ : Finset (Formula ℕ)
hΔ₁ : ↑Δ ⊆ LO.Propositional.FTheory.lindenbaum.construction L χ ξ T hT (encode ψ)
hΔ₂ : Δ.conj ⋏ ψ ➝ ξ ∈ LO.Propositional.FTheory.theory L T
m : ℕ := max (encode φ) (encode ψ)
⊢ ↑(Γ ∪ Δ) ⊆ LO.Propositional.FTheory.lindenbaum.construction L χ ξ T hT m

proof:
intro x hx;
    rcases Finset.mem_union.mp hx with h | h
    . exact monotone_construction (le_max_left _ _) (hΓ₁ h)
    . exact monotone_construction (le_max_right _ _) (hΔ₁ h)
failed_attempts:
simp at hx
    rcases hx with h | h
    · exact monotone_construction (le_max_left _ _) (hΓ₁ h)
    · exact monotone_construction (le_max_right _ _) (hΔ₁ h)

simp at hx; rcases hx with hx | hx
    . exact monotone_construction (le_max_left _ _) (hΓ₁ hx)
    . exact monotone_construction (le_max_right _ _) (hΔ₁ hx)

simp at hx;
    cases hx with
    | inl h => exact monotone_construction (le_max_left _ _) (hΓ₁ h)
    | inr h => exact monotone_construction (le_max_right _ _) (hΔ₁ h)

simp at hx;
    cases hx with
    | inl h => exact monotone_construction (le_max_left _ _) (hΓ₁ h)
    | inr h => exact monotone_construction (le_max_right _ _) (hΔ₁ h)
successful_attempts:
intro x hx;
    rcases Finset.mem_union.mp hx with h | h
    . exact monotone_construction (le_max_left _ _) (hΓ₁ h)
    . exact monotone_construction (le_max_right _ _) (hΔ₁ h)
intro x hx; cases Finset.mem_union.mp hx with | inl h => exact monotone_construction (le_max_left _ _) (hΓ₁ h) | inr h => exact monotone_construction (le_max_right _ _) (hΔ₁ h)
rw [Finset.coe_union]; exact Set.union_subset (hΓ₁.trans $ monotone_construction $ Nat.le_max_left _ _) (hΔ₁.trans $ monotone_construction $ Nat.le_max_right _ _)

intro x hx
    rcases Finset.mem_union.1 hx with h | h
    · exact monotone_construction (le_max_left _ _) (hΓ₁ h)
    · exact monotone_construction (le_max_right _ _) (hΔ₁ h)

intro x hx;
    cases Finset.mem_union.1 hx with
    | inl h => exact monotone_construction (Nat.le_max_left _ _) (hΓ₁ h)
    | inr h => exact monotone_construction (Nat.le_max_right _ _) (hΔ₁ h)
intro x hx; cases Finset.mem_union.mp hx with | inl h => exact monotone_construction (le_max_left _ _) (hΓ₁ h) | inr h => exact monotone_construction (le_max_right _ _) (hΔ₁ h)

simp [Set.union_subset_iff]
    exact ⟨hΓ₁.trans (monotone_construction $ le_max_left _ _), hΔ₁.trans (monotone_construction $ le_max_right _ _)⟩

intro x hx;
    cases Finset.mem_union.mp hx with
    | inl h => exact monotone_construction (le_max_left _ _) (hΓ₁ h)
    | inr h => exact monotone_construction (le_max_right _ _) (hΔ₁ h)

intro x hx;
    cases Finset.mem_union.1 hx with
    | inl h => exact monotone_construction (le_max_left _ _) (hΓ₁ h)
    | inr h => exact monotone_construction (le_max_right _ _) (hΔ₁ h)

intro x hx; rcases Finset.mem_union.1 hx with h | h
    . exact monotone_construction (le_max_left _ _) (hΓ₁ h)
    . exact monotone_construction (le_max_right _ _) (hΔ₁ h)
simp [Set.union_subset_iff, Finset.coe_union]; exact ⟨hΓ₁.trans (monotone_construction $ le_max_left _ _), hΔ₁.trans (monotone_construction $ le_max_right _ _)⟩
intro x hx; cases Finset.mem_union.mp hx with | inl h => exact monotone_construction (Nat.le_max_left _ _) (hΓ₁ h) | inr h => exact monotone_construction (Nat.le_max_right _ _) (hΔ₁ h)
simp [Set.union_subset_iff]; exact ⟨hΓ₁.trans (monotone_construction $ Nat.le_max_left _ _), hΔ₁.trans (monotone_construction $ Nat.le_max_right _ _)⟩

intro x hx;
    cases Finset.mem_union.mp hx with
    | inl hL => exact monotone_construction (Nat.le_max_left _ _) (hΓ₁ hL)
    | inr hR => exact monotone_construction (Nat.le_max_right _ _) (hΔ₁ hR)
rw [Finset.coe_union, Set.union_subset_iff]; exact ⟨Set.Subset.trans hΓ₁ (monotone_construction $ le_max_left _ _), Set.Subset.trans hΔ₁ (monotone_construction $ le_max_right _ _)⟩
